name: Pasta Fagioli Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15-19 oz) cannellini beans, undrained, mashed with fork
1 can (15-19 oz) red kidney beans, drained
1 cup small pasta shells or ditalini
salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add bacon, celery, onion, and garlic. Cook 7 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the bacon is cooked and vegetables are softened.
3. Stir in chicken broth and kidney beans (both white and red). Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Add pasta and reduce heat to medium. Cook, uncovered, for 8 to 10 minutes or until pasta is cooked but not mushy, stirring frequently.
5. Taste to test tenderness. Season with salt and pepper. Serves 6.
